case_title: LEGALMATCH.COM. VS. NICHOLAS ROBIN WESTBROOK et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM. AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBROOK, NICHOLAS ROBIN WESTBROOK II, MICHAEL FONTANE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-05-2010

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $211.15 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBROOK II, MICHAEL FONTANE

ORDER THAT THE CLERK'S JUDGMENT ENTERED ON DEC. 31, 2009, AGAINST DEFENDANT MICHAEL FONTAINE WESTBROOK II, PER COURT ORDER OF JAN. 22, 2010.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) NICHOLAS ROBIN WESTBROOK. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
